title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Local Government (village Or Ward Development Committee) Regulations
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Local Government (village Or Ward Development Committee) Regulations

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Local Government (Village or Ward Development Committee) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content:
2. Interpretation
In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires
" Committee " means a village or ward development committee established under regulation 3; and
" Umbrella Committee " means a committee established under regulation 15.

provisions.title: Establishment of Committee
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Committee
There is hereby established a Committee to be known as the Village or Ward Development Committee.

provisions.title: Membership of Committee
provisions.content:
4. Membership of Committee
The Committee shall consist of

definitions.definition: a village or ward development committee established under regulation 3
